cerial.format.alignmentScope.markdownDescription:
Alignment scope for field decorators.
- `group`: align within each model/object block
- `block`: align across the entire file

cerial.format.fieldGroupBlankLines.markdownDescription:
Blank line handling between field groups.
- `single`: one blank line between groups
- `honor`: preserve existing blank lines
- `collapse`: remove blank lines between groups

cerial.format.blockSeparation.markdownDescription:
Blank lines between top-level blocks (models, objects, etc.).
- `1`: single blank line
- `2`: double blank line
- `honor`: preserve existing separation

cerial.format.indentSize.markdownDescription:
Indentation size for formatted output.
- `2`: two spaces
- `4`: four spaces
- `tab`: tab character

cerial.format.inlineConstructStyle.markdownDescription:
Style for inline constructs (enums, literals, tuples).
- `single`: collapse to one line when possible
- `multi`: always expand to multiple lines
- `honor`: preserve existing style

cerial.format.decoratorAlignment.markdownDescription:
Decorator alignment style.
- `aligned`: column-align decorators across fields
- `compact`: no extra alignment spacing

cerial.format.trailingComma.markdownDescription: Add trailing commas in multi-line constructs (enums, literals, tuples).

cerial.format.commentStyle.markdownDescription:
Comment style normalization.
- `honor`: preserve existing comment style
- `hash`: convert to `#` comments
- `slash`: convert to `//` comments

cerial.format.blankLineBeforeDirectives.markdownDescription:
Blank line before directives (`@@index`, `@@unique`).
- `always`: always insert a blank line
- `honor`: preserve existing formatting

cerial.diagnostics.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable or disable all diagnostics (parse errors and schema validation).

cerial.inlayHints.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable or disable all inlay hints.

cerial.inlayHints.inferredTypes.markdownDescription: Show inferred FK type hints on Record fields (e.g., `: CerialId<number>`).

cerial.inlayHints.serverSetFields.markdownDescription: Show behavioral hints for server-set fields (`auto-generated`, `server-set`, `computed`, `resets on write`).

cerial.inlayHints.inheritedFields.markdownDescription: Show `from ParentName` hints on inherited fields.

cerial.trace.server.markdownDescription: Trace the communication between VS Code and the Cerial language server.
